argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const username = "{{ username }}"; const res = await fetch('https://www.tiktok.com/@' + encodeURIComponent(username), { credentials: 'include' }); if (!res.ok) return [{ username: username, name: '', bio: 'User not found', followers: 0, following: 0, likes: 0, videos: 0, verified: 'No' }]; const html = await res.text(); const idx = html.indexOf('__UNIVERSAL_DATA_FOR_REHYDRATION__'); if (idx === -1) return [{ username: username, name: '', bio: 'Could not parse profile data', followers: 0, following: 0, likes: 0, videos: 0, verified: 'No' }]; const start = html.indexOf('>', idx) + 1; const end = html.indexOf('</script>', start); const data = JSON.parse(html.substring(start, end)); const ud = data['__DEFAULT_SCOPE__'] && data['__DEFAULT_SCOPE__']['webapp.user-detail']; const u = ud && ud.userInfo && ud.userInfo.user; const s = ud && ud.userInfo && ud.userInfo.stats; if (!u) return [{ username: username, name: '', bio: 'User not found', followers: 0, following: 0, likes: 0, videos: 0, verified: 'No' }]; return [{ username: u.uniqueId || username, name: u.nickname || '', bio: (u.signature || '').replace(/\n/g, ' ').substring(0, 120), followers: s && s.followerCount || 0, following: s && s.followingCount || 0, likes: s && s.heartCount || 0, videos: s && s.videoCount || 0, verified: u.verified ? 'Yes' : 'No' }]; }
